name: Yao Guang
desc: Mysterious, bold, radical... her quest for change is stunning.\nWith the "eye" of The Hunt, she sees all fates. Though she knows fate is immutable, the Seer Strategist still walks into danger alone.\nWith the odds stacked against her, how can she possibly change her destiny?

1.name: Chuckle Chimes Where Jade Falls
1.desc: In <u>Aha's</u> <u>extra turn</u> triggered by Ultimate, the fixed amount of <u>Punchline</u> taken into account increases to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. When dealing <u>Elation DMG</u>, all ally targets ignore <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the target's DEF.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000026.name: Aha
10000026.desc: When taking action, triggers an Aha Instant and causes units capable of using Elation Skills to each use their Elation Skill 1 time. If there are no units capable of using Elation Skills when Aha takes action, Aha will use "Let There Be Laughter."\nThe Aha Instant lasts until the final Elation Skill finishes this time.\nWhen the Aha Instant ends, participating characters gain the "Certified Banger" state for the Punchline points taken into account this time, lasting for 2 turns. After Aha takes action, all Punchlines will be consumed.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

2.name: Blind Arrows Guided by Feathers
2.desc: While the Zone is active, increases all ally targets' SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and additionally increases Elation by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Auspices Mirrored In Decalight
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Threads of Fate Colored by Plumes
4.desc: In <u>Aha's</u> <u>extra turn</u> triggered by Yao Guang's Ultimate, the DMG dealt by all ally characters' Elation Skill becomes <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000026.name: Aha
10000026.desc: When taking action, triggers an Aha Instant and causes units capable of using Elation Skills to each use their Elation Skill 1 time. If there are no units capable of using Elation Skills when Aha takes action, Aha will use "Let There Be Laughter."\nThe Aha Instant lasts until the final Elation Skill finishes this time.\nWhen the Aha Instant ends, participating characters gain the "Certified Banger" state for the Punchline points taken into account this time, lasting for 2 turns. After Aha takes action, all Punchlines will be consumed.

5.name: Bejeweled in Radiant Grace
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Ferried Along the Astral Arc
6.desc: All ally targets' <u>Elation DMG</u> <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Increases the DMG multiplier of Yao Guang's Elation Skill by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of its original multiplier.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

30000011.name: Merrymake
30000011.desc: A special effect that affects Elation DMG and can additionally boost Elation DMG dealt.

150201.name: Whistlebolt Sings Joy
150201.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yao Guang's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yao Guang's ATK to targets adjacent to it. The Energy regenerated from Basic ATK increases to <unbreak>30</unbreak>.
150201.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy target and minor Physical DMG to adjacent targets.

150202.name: Decalight Unveils All
150202.desc: Deploys a Zone for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of this unit's every turn. While the Zone is active, increases all allies' Elation by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Yao Guang's Elation. After Yao Guang uses Basic ATK or Skill, gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u>.
150202.simple_desc: Deploys a Zone that <color=#f29e38ff>increases Elation</color> for all ally targets. After Yao Guang uses Basic ATK or Skill, <color=#f29e38ff>gains <u>Punchline</u></color>.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

150203.name: Hexagram of Feathered Fortune
150203.desc: Gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u>. <u>Aha</u> immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> where a fixed amount of <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> is taken into account. This turn does not consume <u>Punchline</u>, and increases all allies' All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
150203.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Gains <u>Punchline</u></color>. Immediately grants <color=#f29e38ff><u>Aha</u></color> 1 <color=#f29e38ff><u>extra turn</u></color> where a fixed amount of <u>Punchline</u> is taken into account, and increases all allies' All-Type <u>RES PEN</u>.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000026.name: Aha
10000026.desc: When taking action, triggers an Aha Instant and causes units capable of using Elation Skills to each use their Elation Skill 1 time. If there are no units capable of using Elation Skills when Aha takes action, Aha will use "Let There Be Laughter."\nThe Aha Instant lasts until the final Elation Skill finishes this time.\nWhen the Aha Instant ends, participating characters gain the "Certified Banger" state for the Punchline points taken into account this time, lasting for 2 turns. After Aha takes action, all Punchlines will be consumed.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

150204.name: Behold Wherever Light Unfolds
150204.desc:
While Yao Guang holds "<u>Certified Banger</u>":
After an ally target uses an attack, triggers the "Great Boon" effect, dealing 1 additional instance of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> <u>Elation DMG</u> of the corresponding Type to 1 random hit target. If this attack consumes Skill Points, then additionally triggers "Great Boon" 1 time.
When triggering the "Great Boon" effect, if the attacker's Elation is lower than that of Yao Guang, then this instance of <u>Elation DMG</u> will take Yao Guang's Elation into calculation.
Triggering the "Great Boon" effect is not considered as using 1 instance of attack.
150204.simple_desc: While Yao Guang is in possession of "<u>Certified Banger</u>," after an ally target uses an attack, triggers "Great Boon": <color=#f29e38ff>Additionally deals</color> 1 instance of minor <color=#f29e38ff><u>Elation DMG</u></color> of the corresponding Type to 1 random hit target. If this attack consumes Skill Points, this effect triggers 1 extra time. This effect is not considered as using 1 instance of attack.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

150206.name: Whistlebolt Sings Joy
150206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

150207.name: Untethered Glimmer Sails Far
150207.desc: After using Technique, automatically triggers Skill 1 time at the start of the next battle without consuming any Skill Points. When Yao Guang is in the team, breaking destructible objects immediately grants Fortune Pouch, up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> within every Earth Week.
150207.simple_desc: Upon entering combat, automatically triggers Skill 1 time. When Yao Guang is in the team, immediately gains Fortune Pouch when breaking destructible objects.

150220.name: Let Thy Fortune Burst in Flames
150220.desc: Inflicts "Woe's Whisper" on all enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Enemy targets under the "Woe's Whisper" state take <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak> increased DMG. Deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies. Then, deals <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy.
150220.simple_desc: Increases DMG received by all enemies. Deals Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies. Then, deals minor Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

1.point_desc: When Yao Guang's SPD is <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or higher, increases this unit's Elation by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. For every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> SPD exceeded, increases this unit's Elation by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. Up to a max of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.
Increases this unit's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. After using Elation Skill, recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for the team.
When Yao Guang gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>," its duration increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.
